title: PurchasePlan
description: A buy-now-vs-wait decision for an item (the umbrella's PurchasePlan / Buy-Now-vs-Wait Score). Provided by Module 6 to Tasks, Pay, and Inbox. Recommend-only (FinOS never moves money). Grounded in BudgetState/CashFlowForecast/GoalState (PRIMARY money inputs: stale/missing ⇒ score WITHHELD, never guessed) and SafeToActSignal (Cash Safety precedence). MUST cite price trend AND budget headroom AND runway/safety (SC-SH-001).

profile_id.description: Owning profile; cross-member reads are authZ-checked server-side (threat model IDOR).

watch_id.description: Optional link to the WatchedItems entry this plan concerns.

decision.description: buy_now is FORBIDDEN when SafeToActSignal flags risk (Cash Safety precedence) and when no safety input is available for a material spend (capped at wait/neutral, Clarification Q4).

score.description: Buy-now-vs-wait confidence in [0,1]; higher = stronger buy-now. Derived, not a money value.

recommended_best_date.description: Projected best date to buy; null when no better date is predictable. Rendered in the active locale at the edge.

projected_saving_by_waiting.description: Estimated CAD cents saved by waiting to recommended_best_date; 0 when waiting yields no saving.

goal_impact.description: Time-to-goal impact of buying now vs waiting; null when no goal is linked (line omitted, never shown as 'no goal').

days_delta.description: Days added (+) or saved (-) toward the linked goal if the user buys now versus waiting.

safety_signal_source.description: Which safety input grounded the decision. 'cash_flow_forecast' = fell back to spine forecast when SafeToActSignal absent; 'unavailable' = no safety input, decision capped at wait/neutral for material spends (Clarification Q4; Constitution VI documented-default boundary).

safe_to_act_deferred.description: true iff Cash Safety's SafeToActSignal overrode a would-be buy_now (conflict + resolution surfaced via the Conflict Banner).

reasoning.description: MUST include price_trend, budget_headroom_cents, and a runway/safety input in inputs, plus bilingual rationale_en/rationale_fr (FR-X-006, SC-SH-001).

freshness.description: Freshness of the most-stale money input the score depends on; stale money input ⇒ score withheld upstream, never served on this contract as fresh.
